series: Goblin Court Series 1: Receipts vs Vibes

candidates.visual_prompt: Satirical portrait trading card art, white border, readable top title plate 'GOBLIN COURT SERIES 1', readable bottom name plate 'VIBE VICTORIA — NARRATIVE ENGINEER'. Cyber-comic Goblin Court aesthetic, neon terminal green and glitch purple palette. Character: goblin DJ with headset, mixing board labeled 'NARRATIVE', sliders set to 'FACTS: 0' and 'VIBES: 11'. Background: crowd of goblins nodding, eyes closed, speech bubbles full of sparkle emojis. Funny and sharp, no real public figures, no legal guilt claims, no financial safety claims.

metadata_candidate.name: Vibe Victoria
metadata_candidate.description: Narrative engineer. Role: Calibrates consensus through aesthetic consensus. Flavor text: 'The vibes are immaculate.' Specialty: converting consensus into evidence. Counters: primary sources, falsification.

metadata_candidate.name: Receipt Rita
metadata_candidate.description: Inspector Goblin demanding evidence. Role: Terminates vibes with verification. Flavor text: 'Show the receipt.' Specialty: collapsing narratives to citations. Counters: trust-me-bro, unsourced claims.

candidates.visual_prompt: Satirical portrait trading card art, white border, readable top title plate 'GOBLIN COURT SERIES 1', readable bottom name plate 'RECURSIVE REX — AI GOBLIN'. Cyber-comic Goblin Court aesthetic, neon terminal green and glitch purple palette. Character: robot goblin with fractal head, screens for eyes showing nested summaries. Arms are printers spitting out 'Summary of Summary of Summary'. Background: hall of mirrors with citations pointing to each other, origin nowhere. Funny and sharp, no real public figures, no legal guilt claims, no financial safety claims.

metadata_candidate.name: Recursive Rex
metadata_candidate.description: AI goblin summarizing summaries. Role: Compresses information until origin vanishes. Flavor text: 'According to my summary of your summary…' Specialty: reference loops. Counters: primary documents, provenance tracking.

candidates.visual_prompt: Satirical portrait trading card art, white border, readable top title plate 'GOBLIN COURT SERIES 1', readable bottom name plate 'SUPREME GOBLIN GENERAL — AUDITOR OF AUDITORS'. metadata_candidate.name: Supreme Goblin General
metadata_candidate.description: Auditor of auditors. Role: Questions the questioners. Flavor text: 'Authority remains false.' Specialty: epistemic regression. Counters: all claims, including its own.
